title: fix: make usage field optional in chat completion response schema
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: No receipt needed
gist.blurb: We taught the API to stop asking for usage stats when they aren't there. Less paperwork, more chatting.
gist.summary: Updated the chat completion schema to make the `usage` field optional, preventing validation errors for providers that omit it.
gist.impact: API requests to community models that don't report usage stats will now succeed instead of failing validation.
gist.visual_concept: The Robot acting as a friendly gatekeeper, checking a clipboard (schema) but happily ignoring a blank spot for 'usage'. The Bee is chatting nearby, representing the message passing through.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute robot with monitor head holding a clipboard with a checklist, smiling and waving a green flag. The bee mascot hovers nearby with a speech bubble. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic.
